description: Mirai provides hotel direct-sales technology including a booking engine, metasearch connectivity, websites, digital marketing, and AI infrastructure for hotels. Its AI infrastructure includes MCP connectivity that exposes hotel content, availability, rates, and booking operations to AI agents.
summary: Mirai exposes a public MCP endpoint for at least one hotel (`https://api.mirai.com/synapse/mcp?hotelId=10030559`) with no auth, and publicly advertises a booking engine API/integration surface, but no developer docs, spec, base URL, or authentication details for that HTTP API were found.
